examples.title: Normal PDF Calculator
examples.description: Calculates PDF of N(μ, σ²) at x
examples.explanation: Implements PDF formula using math library

examples.title: Inverse Transform Sampling
examples.code:
FUNCTION sample_exponential(lambda):
    U ← RANDOM()  // U ~ Uniform[0,1]
    RETURN -ln(1 - U) / lambda
examples.explanation: Applies inverse CDF method for Exponential distribution
